flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Bakersfield rose 45% between 2007 and 2010 ($5.5k → $8.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Bakersfield rose 69% between 2021 and 2024 (17.4% → 29.5%).
